hero.description: High-performance inference optimization platform for LLM applications

hero.shortDescription: High-performance inference optimization platform for LLM applications

features.title: Core Capabilities
features.subtitle: Three core technologies for ultimate performance and cost optimization
features.smartCachingDesc: Multi-level caching system based on semantic similarity, automatically identifying duplicate queries with 85% cache hit rate, significantly reducing API costs
features.dynamicRoutingDesc: Real-time task complexity evaluation, intelligently selecting optimal model combinations - lightweight models for simple tasks, auto-upgrade to large models for complex tasks
features.highAvailabilityDesc: Multi-node redundant deployment with automatic failover, supporting 100k+ QPS concurrency, enterprise-grade SLA guarantee for business continuity

home.coreCapabilitiesDesc: Three core technologies for ultimate performance and cost optimization
home.smartCachingDesc: Multi-level caching system based on semantic similarity

price.title: Transparent Pricing
price.subtitle: Pay as you go, flexible choices, providing you with the most cost-effective AI services
price.description: We offer competitive pricing, allowing you to get high-quality AI capabilities at lower costs. Enterprise users can also enjoy bulk discounts and customized plans.

free.name: Free
free.description: Suitable for individual developers and testing

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Suitable for individual developers and small teams

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Suitable for large enterprises and high-concurrency scenarios

billing.title: Billing Methods
billing.payAsYouGoDesc: Charged based on actual usage, no fixed monthly fee, suitable for unstable usage scenarios. Charged by token with transparent pricing.
billing.monthlyDesc: Fixed monthly fee with lower unit prices, suitable for enterprise users with stable usage. API calls can be accumulated within the plan.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How to choose the right plan for me?
faq.a1: If you are an individual developer or just for testing, we recommend starting with the Free plan. If your project needs to go live, we recommend Pro or Enterprise for better service support.
faq.a2: After logging into the console, you can view detailed API call statistics and usage reports on the Account Management page.
faq.a3: We offer 7-day no-questions-asked refund service. If you are not satisfied with the service, you can apply for a full refund within 7 days of purchase.
faq.q4: What exclusive services does Enterprise plan include?
faq.a4: Enterprise users enjoy exclusive customer support, SLA service guarantees, customized model training, priority technical support and other exclusive services.

intro.description1: Founded in 2026, Eucal AI is an innovative technology company specializing in AI technology research, development and applications. We are committed to transforming cutting-edge AI technology into practical business value, providing intelligent solutions for enterprises.
intro.description2: Our team consists of AI experts from top global universities and technology companies, with deep technical expertise in machine learning, natural language processing, and computer vision.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Building AI Ecosystem Together
ecosystem.description: We are committed to building an open AI ecosystem with our partners, providing richer and more powerful AI capabilities for developers and enterprises.
ecosystem.technicalDesc: Collaborate with technology partners to develop innovative solutions, combining双方的 technical strengths to provide better AI products and services for customers.
ecosystem.channelDesc: Recruit regional agents and channel partners to jointly explore the market, providing competitive commission policies and marketing support.
ecosystem.solutionDesc: Partner with industry solution providers to create vertical industry AI application solutions, meeting specific industry needs.
ecosystem.strategicDesc: Establish deep cooperation with strategic partners to jointly explore AI technology frontiers and conduct joint R&D and marketing.
ecosystem.benefit1Desc: Get one-on-one support from professional technical team
ecosystem.benefit3Desc: Jointly host marketing activities for co-promotion
ecosystem.benefit4Desc: Experience new features and products first
ecosystem.benefit5Desc: Regular product training and technical exchanges
